mission: Map the agent loop and session lifecycle
key_corrections: DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD at processor.ts:32 is NOT ad-hoc â€” it is an automated same-tool+same-input pattern detector (threshold=3), triggering doom_loop permission check at processor.ts:436-453
Orchestration is distributed (Secretary+task tool+Coordination+Processor), not centralized in a single orchestrator.ts

main_loop.structure: while(true) imperative loop inside Effect.gen generator
main_loop.description: Each iteration: check tasksâ†’resolve agentâ†’create processor handleâ†’call handle.process(LLM stream)â†’evaluate result (compact|stop|continue|break)â†’loop or exit

exit_conditions.condition: Orphaned interrupted tool in last assistant
Finish reason present, no error, not tool-calls
Structured output format, model didn't produce it

max_steps.description: agent.steps config; on last step injects max-steps.txt (16-line CRITICAL warning, tools disabled, text-only)

doom_loop_detector.mechanism: Checks if last N assistant parts are identical tool calls (same tool name + same input). If detected, raises 'doom_loop' permission check to Permission.ask. If permission rules deny it, the tool is blocked and ctx.shouldBreak is set.
doom_loop_detector.description: Automated same-tool+same-input pattern detector. NOT a manual config tool â€” it's a runtime loop breaker that detects repetitive tool cycles.

overflow_guard.description: isOverflow() compares total tokens against usable() minus COMPACTION_BUFFER

blocked_guard.description: Tool denied + config flag shouldBreakâ†’return 'stop'. Config.experimental.continue_loop_on_deny can bypass this.

retry_policy.description: Exponential backoff 2sâ†’2xâ†’30s cap; rate-limit upsell; 5xx retry

machine_loop.structure: while(running) loop driving state machine def.handle() for subagent machines
machine_loop.note: Independent second loop with no coordination to main prompt loop

remaining_gaps: DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD detects same-tool+same-input cycles but NOT tool1â†’tool2â†’tool1â†’tool2 alternating cycles
No wall-clock session-level timeout (only per-role agent machine timeouts)
No consecutive-empty-response detector (LLM returning empty text with no tool calls)

gaps: No orphan cleanup (only cascade on explicit remove)

task_tool.role: Spawns subagent sessions via Session.create(), supports foreground+background mode

coordination.role: DB-backed distributed claims (30-min TTL), path reservations, fan-out groups

orchestrator.concurrency: Unbounded â€” any agent can spawn any number of subagents via Effect.forkIn(scope). Background subagents gated behind OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_BACKGROUND_SUBAGENTS flag.
gaps: ZERO tests across entire campaign module

smoking_guns.title: DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD covers same-tool cycles but not alternating cycles
smoking_guns.detail: processor.ts:436-453 detects last 3 tool calls with identical tool+input. Alternating patterns (tool1â†’tool2â†’tool1â†’tool2) evade detection.

smoking_guns.title: No secondary loop breaker beyond step counter and doom-loop detector
smoking_guns.detail: while(true) at prompt.ts:1244-1492 has no wall-clock timeout or empty-response detector. The DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD only catches identical repetitions, not alternating cycles.

smoking_guns.title: Zero campaign/orchestrator tests
smoking_guns.detail: test/campaign/test_state_machine.ts is a placeholder. Entire orchestration layer untested.

smoking_guns.title: Orchestrator concurrency unbounded
smoking_guns.detail: No max-concurrency cap on parallel lane dispatch or subagent spawning.

smoking_guns.title: No session timeout or orphan cleanup
smoking_guns.detail: Sessions can run/linger indefinitely. Only cascade-delete on explicit parent removal.

smoking_guns.title: Two independent while loops with no coordination
smoking_guns.detail: Main loop (prompt.ts) and machine loop (machine/runtime.ts) operate independently.
